entity.label: Chloe
entity.subtitle: Female
entity.description: Verdure, a female Christian (1 Cor. 1:11), some of whose household had informed Paul of the divided state of the Corinthian church. Nothing is known of her.

nodes.label: Chloe
nodes.description: Verdure, a female Christian (1 Cor. 1:11), some of whose household had informed Paul of the divided state of the Corinthian church. Nothing is known of her.

verses.text: For it hath been declared unto me of you, my brethren, by them which are of the house of Chloe, that there are contentions among you.
